arts.ttl: PSG’s Randal Kolo Muani likely to make Premier League move as Tottenham join the race
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani’s (26) situation at Paris Saint-Germain is unsustainable. Still prominent at international level, he has been marginalised by Luis Enrique at PSG with the forward not even included…

arts.ttl: Tottenham ‘most interested’ in player, has ‘real option’ of joining Spurs – Club keen to sell
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are one of five clubs keen on signing Real Betis’ Johnny Cardoso. That’s according to Diario de Sevilla, who state Tottenham are ‘really interested’ in the midfielder. He overcame issues at the start of the season and has regained his best level at the La Liga side. arts.ttl: Tottenham star Sergio Reguilon deletes all of his Instagram posts with his ex-girlfriend - before posting Christmas Day pictures with his new influencer partner
arts.sum: Sergio Reguilon's followers have noticed that he has made the decision to delete all of his Instagram posts that included his ex-girlfriend Marta Diaz.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs. Tottenham Hotspur: Nuno Espirito Santo's side looking to end 29-year streak in Boxing Day game
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest will be looking to end a 29-year streak when they play host to Tottenham Hotspur on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest told to sign £7m Leeds United star in January amid Andrew Omobamidele links
arts.sum: Would you want him Forest fans?

arts.ttl: Spurs players Postecoglou must build his team around to save his job
arts.sum: One of the best defenders in the Premier League on his day and boy how Tottenham have missed him at the heart of their defence. After Christmas he will likely see some important players returning to the first team setup and there are certain players in the squad that Postecoglou needs to call upon and build his team around to ensure he remains in a job and gets Tottenham moving on up the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Spurs 'need to reinforce' in January - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham are "short in a couple of areas" and "need to reinforce" during the January transfer window, says Ange Postecoglou.
